personal_info.name: Senior Flutter Engineer
personal_info.bio: I have been building production Flutter applications since 2021 across mobile, desktop, and web. My work centres on clear product behaviour, resilient offline data, real-time synchronisation, and code that teams can maintain.

experiences.title: Flutter Developer
experiences.description: Building production applications for Android and iOS tablets plus Linux, macOS, and Windows desktops. The work includes offline-first SQLite and Drift data, native integrations, and reliable real-time synchronisation.

experiences.title: Mobile Team Lead
experiences.description: Led mobile delivery for a logistics product, including WebSocket-based vehicle tracking, Google and Apple Maps integrations, and coordination with a React web application.

experiences.title: Flutter Developer
experiences.description: Delivered consumer publishing applications for Android and iOS with MVVM, GetX, Dio, localisation, and store-ready release workflows.

experiences.title: Software Engineering
experiences.description: Formal software engineering education covering algorithms, data structures, databases, software design, and team-based product development.

projects.title: FakeCallApp
projects.description: A playful fake video-call experience with characters, scheduling, and mobile-first interactions.

projects.title: CleanMyGallery
projects.description: A practical gallery cleaner for finding clutter, compressing photos, and keeping metadata under control.

projects.title: FocusGroves
projects.description: A focus workspace that combines timers, tasks, and shared study rooms.

projects.title: MoodGrade
projects.description: A private mood journal with medication tracking, exports, and useful long-term patterns.

projects.title: GetQrivo
projects.description: A QR toolkit for creating codes, managing short links, and understanding scans.

projects.title: OverlayPhoto
projects.description: A photo editor for overlays, frames, filters, and time-capsule memories.

projects.title: DistractionKiller
projects.description: A digital wellbeing tool for blocking distractions and protecting focus time.

projects.title: KPSSHazirlan
projects.description: A study planner for KPSS preparation, practice sessions, and progress tracking.

projects.title: EhliyetCoz
projects.description: A driving-exam companion with daily quizzes and clear progress feedback.

projects.title: Kazanamazi
projects.description: A calm personal ledger for missed prayers and fasting days, with reminders and history.

projects.title: PDFScanPro
projects.description: A focused PDF toolbox for scanning, compressing, merging, splitting, and converting documents.

proof.title: Own the product
proof.detail: I stay close to the problem from the first interaction through release, support, and the next iteration.

proof.title: Design for real conditions
proof.detail: Offline data, unreliable networks, native integrations, and recovery paths are part of the product—not afterthoughts.

proof.title: Keep it maintainable
proof.detail: Clear boundaries, focused state management, and useful tests make features easier to change after launch.

about_section.title: About Me
about_section.bio: I have been building production Flutter applications since 2021 across mobile, desktop, and web. My work centres on clear product behaviour, resilient offline data, real-time synchronisation, and code that teams can maintain.
about_section.bio2: Alongside client work, I design and operate independent SaaS products end to end—from Flutter interfaces and Go APIs to deployment and monitoring.
